description: Baby Soft Fleece Hooded Dressing Gown. Adorable Designs - These robes feature a hood wih attached ears, 2 front patch pockets, attached tie waist to avoid it getting lost. Adorable Designs - Choose from the cutest styles, from a Teddy Bear to a cheeky little Monkey to simple beautiful embroidery. Sizes - Available in 0-6 Months, 6-12 Months, 12-18 Months or 18-24 Months. Perfect for babies and toddlers to stay warm and cosy during the colder months. Snuggly Material - Made from the softest plush material, perfect for keeping warm and fuzzy! The material benefits from being super soft against the skin, warm but lightweight and easy to care for. Perfect Gift Idea - These dressing gowns make the perfect gift for those expecting, or Christening, Birthday or Christmas presents.
